reasoning: At 1x the bar shrinks to an undifferentiated cream smudge with no readable shape, ornament, or personality — hard fail on the primary readability criterion. At 4x the golden pixel-border gives it a retro-RPG scroll aesthetic with mild charm, but the silhouette is a plain flat rectangle (zero roundness/softness required by cute-charm rubric). Corner decorations add visual noise rather than readable character; they dissolve below ~2x. Contrast on dark BG is acceptable (golden rim pops), but on the light BG the cream interior nearly merges with the background — only the gold border holds it together, and that border is thin enough to feel fragile. The design reads as 'functional RPG UI' rather than 'friendly toy with personality'. No instantly-readable icon, face, or distinctive contour to anchor charm. Does not meet the 8-pass threshold on any axis: 1x readability fails, light-bg contrast fails, charm/softness fails.
